basicInfo.name: Mist
basicInfo.flavor: Although mentally stable, Mist lost all her human emotions, and like a puppet, she simply eliminates enemies before her at Freyja's command.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 40% chance to inflict Fear. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Magic Attack.
 - Adds Effect: 40% chance to inflict Fear. [Duration: 1 Turn(s)]

Skill 1.name: Awakened Beast
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 57% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 35% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]. (Inflicts Unremovable Death when target is inflicted with Fear)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 67% of Magic Attack.
 - Increases Chance: Death chance becomes 40%.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Changes Number of Targets: To All Enemies

Skill 2.name: Deadly Mist
Skill 2.desc:
4 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 57% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 50% chance to inflict Fear. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 35% chance to inflict Death when the target's Attack is lower than the caster's Attack. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] (Inflicts Unremovable Death when target is inflicted with Fear.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 67% of Magic Attack.
 - Increases Chance: Death chance becomes 45%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

Passive.name: Rolling Destruction
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Attack-Based Weakness Hit Chance Boost [Always Active]
 - Revives with 80% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants Crowd Control Immunity upon using a skill 2 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: HP gained upon revival becomes 100%.
 - Increases Effect: Effect Hit Rate Boost to 34%.

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Killing. (As Sanzang - Sun Wukong, the Seven Demon Lords, freedom)
profile.dislikes: Freyja, Celestial Realm, anything that oppresses her, obstructions
profile.story: Although mentally stable, Mist lost all her human emotions, and like a puppet, she simply eliminates enemies before her at Freyja's command.

basicInfo.name: Mist
basicInfo.flavor: Despite Mist's overwhelming powers, her unstable mental state causes repeated failed experiments. Eventually, Freyja restrains her with magical shackles to help her better control those powers.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Awakened Beast
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 52% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 35% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]. (Inflicts Unremovable Death when target is inflicted with Fear)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 52% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Deadly Mist
Skill 2.desc:
4 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 52% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 1 Turn(s)]
 - 45% chance to inflict Fear. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 35% chance to inflict Death when the target's Attack is lower than the caster's Attack. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] (Inflicts Unremovable Death when target is inflicted with Fear.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 52% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Rolling Destruction
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Attack-Based Weakness Hit Chance Boost [Always Active]
 - Revives with 60% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants Crowd Control Immunity upon using a skill 2 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

basicInfo.name: Mist
basicInfo.flavor: Mist is a Celestial discovered by Freyja. Her unstable yet immense powers caught Freyja's eye, so she was subsequently taken as an experimental test subject.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Awakened Beast
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 45% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 30% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]. (Inflicts Unremovable Death when target is inflicted with Fear)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 45% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Deadly Mist
Skill 2.desc:
4 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 47% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Buff Duration Reduction. [Reduced by: 1 Turn(s)]
 - 35% chance to inflict Fear. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 35% chance to inflict Death when the target's Attack is lower than the caster's Attack. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] (Inflicts Unremovable Death when target is inflicted with Fear.)
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 47% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Rolling Destruction
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Attack-Based Weakness Hit Chance Boost [Always Active]
 - Revives with 40% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - Grants Effect Hit Rate Boost. [Always Active]
 - Grants Crowd Control Immunity upon using a skill 2 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
